name: Guangdong Wencan Die Casting Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Wencan Die Casting Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells automobile aluminum alloy precision die castings worldwide. Its automobile castings include engine systems, electronic control systems, transmission systems, chassis steering systems, brake systems, air management systems, wiper systems, and body structure parts. The company also provides non-automotive pressure castings, including yacht driving axle housings, yacht engine covers, and heat sinks. Guangdong Wencan Die Casting Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Foshan, China.
